# ytsaurus_link (Resource)





<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `path` (String) Link's absolute path.
- `target_path` (String) Link's target path.

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) ObjectID in the YTsaurus cluster, can be found in object's @id attribute.
